original text:
The Bloomington Food Policy Council, established in 2011, exists to increase and preserve access to sustainably produced, locally grown, healthful food for all residents in Monroe and surrounding counties. We are a group of community members committed to building food security by assessing the current food system and advocating policy changes that assure everyone access to affordable and nutritious food, with an emphasis on food produced sustainably by local farmers and gardeners.
BFPC Chair, Ryan Conway, will join the DFMC on Thursday April 13th to discuss the importance of including Food Systems in the City and County's comprehensive and everyday planning activities. The inclusion of Food Systems in the forthcoming City of Bloomington Comprehensive Master Plan (CMP) was mandated by the Imagine Bloomington Steering Committee, tasked by the City of Bloomington to develop core standards for priority needs for the City's next master plan. However, the original draft of the CMP contained only a few, superficial references to this critical element Bloomington's social, economic, and environmental systems. Attendees will be invited to contribute general and specific feedback on goals, policies, and programs that the BFPC should include in its recommendations to the City and County regarding a Food Systems chapter in the CMP. The BFPC is recruiting additional board members, to more thoroughly address this crucial policy work, and will entertain self-nominations on a rolling basis, submitted to bfpc@bloomingtonfpc.org. Come learn about and discuss the fight for food security, food justice, and food sovereignty in Bloomington and Monroe County!

The BFPC is recruiting additional board members, to more thoroughly address this crucial policy work, and will entertain self-nominations on a rolling basis, submitted to . original text:
ANNOUNCEMENT :: Rime Arodaky gowns are making their way from Paris to Minneapolis. Beauties, this is your opportunity to see our newest designer's full collection!
Rime Arodaky creates a new wave of bridal gowns, breaking away from the traditional wide skirts and corseted bustiers. With a nod to the 70's and the rock'n roll bride, Rime has unleashed the inner bridal goddess in her designs with sensual details and romantic, yet innovative cuts.
Call 612.361.7175 // e-mail hello@thewhiteroommpls.com for details! This week will book fast, beauties. Be sure to secure your appointment today!
Our favorite Americana designer is sending back all of her brand new creations to our showroom and we cannot wait!
Chantel Lauren is for the wild at heart and the romantic spirit. Her gowns are organic and artistic, featuring hand painted skirts in customizable colors. From fringe detailing to bell sleeves, these gowns will bring out your inner country rocker!
All of her pieces are 1 0 % O F F all weekend long, beauties.
The White Room is so excited to feature Lola Varma for the first time ever!
This fashion forward Australian brand is for the tailored fashionista who feels most confident in slinky silk or sophisticated separates.
The Lola Varma bride is looking for an  E F F OR T L E S S  elegance on her wedding day.
We are offering 1 0 % O F F these beauties all weekend long!
She stole our hearts with her upbeat attitude and her audacious designs, and now we cannot wait to have her back in our showroom!
Sarah prides herself on a body positive brand and believes that a bride deserves a gown tailored just for her on her big day // that's why each gown is bespoke to its bride's individual measurements. Also- her gowns are just plain FUN.
All gowns are handmade in Chicago by talented people paid a living wage // can we get a HELL YEAH to that?!
Bridal beauties // Sarah Seven is back at it with her AMAZING new 2019 collection // these gowns are the perfect marriage of traditional bride and modern muse // her daring necklines combined with graceful details are young, fresh, and leave you feeling like a totally sophisticated babe.
The L A W bridal was created to provide a range of gowns that cater to women with a clear and individual sense of style.
The White Room is excited to announce that we will be featuring their N E W collection, full of minimalist silhouettes with exceptional details that are modern, polished, and cool.
F R O M  T H E  D E S I G N E R S // " We encourage our brides to wear The LAW, and then write their own."
// We will be offering  1 0 % O F F  any THE LAW dress during this wonderful event // AND, the designer herself will be here to help you select the dress of your dreams.
Exciting news, beauties! New designer to the bridal scene, THENEWHITE, will be debuting her newest collection this weekend!
Come meet the designer, Juliette, sip on some bubbly & see these new gowns in our beautiful showroom!
The fun-loving local ladies of linyage are at it again with a brand new collection!
"... linyage is a design house focused on creating one-of-a-kind, vintage inspired bridal dresses, lingerie, lace toppers and beyond. linyage dresses are born out of a love for hand-crafted work, an appreciation for charming details, and a fondness for the character inherent to vintage lace. Like the name suggests, linyage is about drawing a connection between roots and growth...leaving you with a full heart and an heirloom to leave future lineage."
ALON LIVNE has landed in MPLS and we are so excited to announce that we will be showing his N E W E S T bridal collection for a limited time // if you are on the hunt for some serious jawdroppers, LOOK NO FURTHER.
DAN JONES LABEL is an effortless fusion of luxe fabrics, shape defining silhouettes and exquisite craftsmanship.
Call 612.361.7175 // e-mail hello@thewhiteroommpls.com for details! You do NOT want to miss this weekend.
We are excited to present the N E W 2019 collection of Atelier Pronovias. Designed in Barcelona, these beauties are wonderfully elegant yet innovative designs. Made from luxurious fabrics, these wedding gowns are bound to leave your guests (and future hubs) breathless.
The ladies from Brooklyn are back at it with their edgy, yet sophisticated designs. The White Room will be presenting their 2018 collection and, ladies, these looks are to D I E for.
Come meet the designers, sip on bubbly, and find your dream gown!
Beauties! If you are looking for that romantic, ethereal & free-spirited gown, Stephanie's designs are the perfect dream dress for you.
Odylyne The Ceremony is a line of exquisite bridal gowns designed by Stephanie White- each dress embodies the deep emotion, sensibility and beauty of the life and art. Her collections tie in the feelings of the traditional foundations of marriage to the exotic and unfamiliar, while harnessing the power of the imagination to envision and to escape. The ethereal element is ever present in each style with a twist of romance and deep appreciation of all the delicate moments of the ceremony.
10% off these gorgeous designs all weekend long.
Be sure to make your appointment before the weekend books up!
One-of-a-kind brides // this is THE weekend to find your dream dress.
We are obsessed with Katherine Polk's designs, and are so excited to show our Minnesota brides the chic, emerging bridal trends coming from NYC.
10% off any Houghton gown this weekend- beauties, you do not want to miss this presentation!
Brides-to-be, if you are looking for romantic cuts and beautiful laces in your wedding gown, you absolutely MUST stop by to see the gorgeous Claire Pettibone Romantique collection! Made with love in LA, these beauties feature delicate lace, elegant silhouettes and the designer's signature stunning backs.
This collection is only around for the weekend, darlings.
Call 612.361.7175 // e-mail hello@thewhiteroommpls.com for details!
Locally-based Caroline Hayden is at it again with a beautiful presentation of her current collection from F/W '16 and S/S '17.
Caroline Hayden has been featured in numbers publications and websites, including Harper's Bazaar.com, Rose and Ivy Journal and Minnesota Bride! Her cutting edge designs are unique, using carefully chosen fabrics and embellishments.
Walk-ins welcome on Saturday, November 26th // main fitting room reserved by appointment.
Attention, beauties! This is your chance to see the stunning designs from renowned Australian designer, Mariana Hardwick for a limited time at The White Room!
"... inspired by the grand couturiers of the past, Mariana Hardwick's designs have a distinct contemporary orientation. Drawing inspiration from from contemporary couture, vintage references, texture and drape, the Mariana Hardwick gown is timeless."
Available for 10 days in the showroom // be sure to book your appointment today!
Born from a desire to create a brand for the modern bride, Marquise Bridal has grown rapidly since their debut release in March 2015.
Forever evolving their vision and the pursuit of the perfect gown, Marquise Bride is constantly redefining bridal trends while continuing on with the fundamental theme of simple uncomplicated silhouettes using luxury textiles.
The result is sultry, romantic and luxury gowns for the modern bride.
This collection will be available exclusively to The White Room for a two-week long exhibition of affordable luxury.
Be sure to make your appointment today to see these beauties!
We are excited to announce a month long showcase with our local gal pal, Chelsea Lovett with Modehaus Designs! This talented lady has created sleek modern designs that cater to a bride looking for a classic statement.
Call 612.361.7175 // e-mail hello@thewhiterooommpls.com for details!
The oh-so-talented local jewelry maker, Sara Goldfine of Goldfine Jewelry will be showing off some of her stunning pieces during the next month to accessorize your wedding look to perfection.
15% off these stunners all month long!
Gorgeous Spanish designs from Belén Barbero are coming to MN for one week only!
The White Room will be offering 10% off these gorgeous gowns to our brides for the weekend!
Be sure to book your appointment today.
Suzanne Harward Pop-Up Trunk Show!
Nothing looks more striking on a woman than confidence. Alyssa Kristin collections are thoughtfully designed so that each piece, while varied in style and Silhouette, features a distinctive element - a dramatic train, a unique neckline, a removable skirt. This allows a bride to accentuate her favorite feature, whether it is her back, collar bone or hour glass figure, and radiate confidence.
The White Room is excited to announce that Alyssa will have her beautiful wedding gowns available at The White Room for an exclusive weekend! Come look through these gorgeous gowns & meet-and-greet with designer Alyssa!
Call 612.361.7175 for details or use the 'Book and Appointment' button on the right side of the screen!
Appointments are bound to fill up quickly, be sure to book yours today!
Timeless and elegant for the modern day bride, the Rosa Clara bridal gown collection is luxuriously chic and utilizes the world finest couture fabrications. A bride who wears Rosa Clara will feel unique and special in her beautifully tailored creation. This is the weekend for brides looking to make a timeless statement.
10% off all Rosa Clara gowns will be honored during this showcase.
Call 612.361.7175 or click "Book and Appointment" on the right side of the screen to schedule you appointment today!
The White Room will showase a curated selection of Elizabeth Fillmore gowns during the weekend, showing off the beautiful vairety of gowns the designer has to offer!
10% off any Elizabeth Fillmore gown during this weekend.
Call 612.361.7175 or e-mail us HELLO@THEWHITEROOMMPLS.COM for details!
We are so excited to announce our FIRST trunk show since opening our doors- Come see the beautiful, newly released 2016 Rosa Clara collection at The White Room!
We will be hosting private appointments on Friday, October 23rd in the evening & all-day Saturday, October 24th. An open house will be hosted during the day on Friday, October 23rd & all day on Sunday, October 25th for the brides looking to stop in and look through the collection.
Call/E-mail us for more information!

original text:
Please read before accessing or using any content from this site. If you do not agree with any of the stated terms and conditions listed, then do not continue to access or use this site. By continueing to use this site you are signifying your acceptance of these terms and conditions. US Unclaimed.com reserves the right to modify, add or remove any or all content at any time without prior notice or warning.
US Unclaimed.COM, IT'S OWNERS, AGENTS OR ASSIGNS CANNOT BE HELD LIABLE FOR ANY ACTION OR INCIDENT OCCURRING THROUGH THE USE OR MISUSE OF THIS WEBSITE, ITS FUNCTIONS, CONTENT OR LINKS TO OTHER WEBSITES.
All materials contained in this Website are protected by copyright laws, and may not be reproduced, republished, distributed, transmitted, displayed, broadcast or otherwise exploited in any manner without the express prior written permission of the owners of US Unclaimed.com. You may download material (one copy per page) from this Website for your personal and non-commercial use only, without altering or removing any trademark, copyright or other notice from such material. Any third party materials posted, filed or otherwise communicated to this Website become the copyrighted property of US Unclaimed.com, and may be used, reproduced, published, distributed, transmitted, displayed, broadcast or otherwise exploited by US Unclaimed.com.
The accuracy or reliability of the data is not guaranteed or warranted in any way and US Unclaimed.com, its agencies, representatives, subsidiaries and affiliates disclaim liability of any kind whatsoever, including, without limitation, liability for quality, performance, merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose arising out of the use or inability to use the data.
THIS DATA IS PROVIDED AS IS AND IN NO EVENT SHALL US Unclaimed.COM and its, OWNERS, AGENCIES, REPRESENTATIVES SUBSIDIARIES, ASSIGNS AND AFFILIATES BE LIABLE OR RESPONSIBLE in any manner, whatsoever, for direct, indirect, special, incidental, punitive or consequential damages, howsoever caused, arising out of this website and/or data, in any manner shape or form or reliance on the information it contains.
This is not a contest or promotion. We help you search for and locate any money that you are entitled to - Billions of dollars are listed as claimable. However, you are responsible for directly claiming the money or property from any financial institutions or funds.
Cash Claim is committed to your privacy. The following statements disclose our information gathering and dissemination practices.
If you have any questions about this privacy statement and/or our practices involving your privacy, feel free to contact us at contact@us-unclaimed.com.
When you perform a free trial search on US Unclaimed.com we display the total dollar amount in unclaimed funds that we show reported by the appropriate government agencies. This does not guarantee that this money is 100% absolutely yours. What it means is that there is that total dollar amount shown by government agencies under your name and common variations of your name at the last time we had the information available to us was reported as unclaimed and is able to have a claim form submitted to be paid that amount.
When you order a 7 day subscription to US Unclaimed.com you will get unlimited access to our unclaimed money & unclaimed property records for 7 days. You must use your subscription per the terms and use of this site and on this page. Upon 7 days your subscription will renew automatically every 7 days for continuous unlimited access to our records. Should you wish to cancel your automatic billing you can simply log on to Paypal.com, find your cashunclaimed subscription and press the cancel button. Should you have any trouble canceling your subscription simply email: customerservice@us-unclaimed.com with your full name, the email address which you signed up under and your cashunclaimed username. With all this information we will be glad to cancel your subscription for you. Under no circumstances will we refund payments for previous months subscriptions. We will only cancel your subscription effective the day we receive and process your request. This will only stop future billings from occurring and will not refund you any amounts for any previous payments.
When you orders a subscription to our site it is an unlimited non-commercial search subscription. We perform automated monitoring of all user accounts and if you are suspected of using our services for commercial use we reserve the right to place a hold on your account. This hold will be released after 24 hours time. Generally this hold is triggered after submitting excessive searches from your account. Should your account be placed on hold more than 3 times we will terminate your account with no refund. Further, we reserve the right to pursue all legal remedies against anyone we suspect of stealing our database or intellectual property.
